final:
module SRAM_16bit (
    input [15:0] data_in,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input we,
    input clk,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] sram_cells [0:15]; // 16 x 16-bit SRAM cells

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            sram_cells[addr] <= data_in; // Write operation
        end
        else begin
            data_out <= sram_cells[addr]; // Read operation
        end
    end
endmodule
